summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ECOMMBX banking application after critical bug fix. All login functionality, admin features, and support ticket edit capabilities are working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin Users tab loads correctly (40 users retrieved)
Admin Accounts tab loads quickly (3.04 seconds - optimized endpoint working)
Edit IBAN button appears in Admin Accounts view (28 buttons found)
Edit IBAN modal shows IBAN and BIC pre-filled correctly
Support Tickets tab loads (7 tickets retrieved)
ECOMMBX label appears instead of Super Admin in ticket messages
Support badge appears instead of Staff badge in ticket messages

critical_bug_fixed.issue: serialize_doc was not imported in server.py
critical_bug_fixed.impact: Caused 500 errors on ticket edit endpoints
critical_bug_fixed.verification: All ticket edit endpoints now return 200 OK

ui_changes_verified.super_admin_renamed: ECOMMBX label found in ticket messages
ui_changes_verified.staff_badge_renamed: Support badge found in ticket messages
ui_changes_verified.edit_iban_feature: Button present, modal opens with pre-filled IBAN and BIC
ui_changes_verified.ticket_edit_features: Edit subject and edit message buttons present and functional
